_comment: pi-mono custom-provider config for Unsloth Studio. Drop this into ~/.pi/agent/models.json (or merge with existing). Then `chmod 600 ~/.pi/agent/models.json`. Pre-req: probe-toolcalls.js exits 0 against this endpoint.

cost._comment: Required by pi-mono's calculateCost — local backends MUST declare 0 or pi will report fake dollars per turn.
